006package com.stuypulse.robot.constants;
007
008import static edu.wpi.first.units.Units.Amps;
009
010import com.ctre.phoenix6.configs.ClosedLoopRampsConfigs;
011import com.ctre.phoenix6.configs.CurrentLimitsConfigs;
012import com.ctre.phoenix6.configs.FeedbackConfigs;
013import com.ctre.phoenix6.configs.MotionMagicConfigs;
014import com.ctre.phoenix6.configs.MotorOutputConfigs;
015import com.ctre.phoenix6.configs.OpenLoopRampsConfigs;
016import com.ctre.phoenix6.configs.Slot0Configs;
017import com.ctre.phoenix6.configs.Slot1Configs;
018import com.ctre.phoenix6.configs.Slot2Configs;
019import com.ctre.phoenix6.configs.SlotConfigs;
020import com.ctre.phoenix6.configs.TalonFXConfiguration;
021import com.ctre.phoenix6.hardware.TalonFX;
022import com.ctre.phoenix6.signals.FeedbackSensorSourceValue;
023import com.ctre.phoenix6.signals.GravityTypeValue;
024import com.ctre.phoenix6.signals.InvertedValue;
025import com.ctre.phoenix6.signals.NeutralModeValue;
026import edu.wpi.first.networktables.DoubleSubscriber;
027
028/*-
029 * File containing all of the configurations that different motors require.
030 *
031 * Such configurations include:
032 *  - If it is Inverted
033 *  - The Idle Mode of the Motor
034 *  - The Current Limit
035 *  - The Open Loop Ramp Rate
036 */
037public interface Motors {
038
039        /** Classes to store all of the values a motor needs */
040        public interface Intake {
041
042                TalonFXConfig PIVOT_CONFIG = new TalonFXConfig()
043                                .withSupplyCurrentLimitAmps(30)
044                                .withStatorCurrentLimitAmps(40)
045                                .withInvertedValue( // not necessarily true, get inverted val
046                                                InvertedValue.Clockwise_Positive)
047                                .withNeutralMode(NeutralModeValue.Brake)
048                                .withSensorToMechanismRatio(Settings.Intake.Pivot.GEAR_RATIO)
049                                .withGravityType(GravityTypeValue.Arm_Cosine)
050                                .withPIDConstants(Gains.Intake.kP, Gains.Intake.kI, Gains.Intake.kD, 0)
051                                .withFFConstants(
052                                                Gains.Intake.kS.in(Amps),
053                                                Gains.Intake.kA.in(Amps),
054                                                Gains.Intake.kV.in(Amps),
055                                                Gains.Intake.kG.in(Amps), // regular constants
056                                                0)
057                                .withPIDConstants(
058                                                Gains.Intake.Digestion.kP, Gains.Intake.Digestion.kI, Gains.Intake.Digestion.kD, 1)
059                                .withFFConstants(
060                                                Gains.Intake.kS.in(Amps),
061                                                Gains.Intake.kA.in(Amps),
062                                                Gains.Intake.kV.in(Amps),
063                                                Gains.Intake.kG.in(Amps), // digestion constants
064                                                1);
065
066                TalonFXConfig LEFT_ROLLER_CONFIG = // TODO: apply later
067                                new TalonFXConfig()
068                                                .withStatorCurrentLimitAmps(50)
069                                                .withInvertedValue( // not necessarily true, get inverted val
070                                                                InvertedValue.CounterClockwise_Positive)
071                                                .withNeutralMode(NeutralModeValue.Coast)
072                                                .withSensorToMechanismRatio(Settings.Intake.Roller.GEAR_RATIO);
073
074                TalonFXConfig RIGHT_ROLLER_CONFIG = // TODO: apply later
075                                new TalonFXConfig()
076                                                .withStatorCurrentLimitAmps(50)
077                                                .withInvertedValue(InvertedValue.Clockwise_Positive)
078                                                .withNeutralMode(NeutralModeValue.Coast)
079                                                .withSensorToMechanismRatio(Settings.Intake.Roller.GEAR_RATIO);
080        }
081
082        public interface Feeder {
083
084                // TODO: get values after motor pinion swap
085                TalonFXConfig LEADER_CONFIG = new TalonFXConfig()
086                                .withStatorCurrentLimitAmps(80)
087                                // .withRampRate(0.25)
088                                .withNeutralMode(NeutralModeValue.Coast)
089                                .withInvertedValue(InvertedValue.Clockwise_Positive)
090                                .withSensorToMechanismRatio(Settings.Feeder.GEAR_RATIO);
091        }
092
093        public interface Shooter {
094                TalonFXConfig SHOOTER_MOTOR_LEFT = new TalonFXConfig()
095                                .withPIDConstants(Gains.Shooter.kP.get(), Gains.Shooter.kI.get(), Gains.Shooter.kD.get(), 0)
096                                .withSupplyCurrentLimitAmps(80)
097                                .withNeutralMode(NeutralModeValue.Coast)
098                                .withFFConstants(Gains.Shooter.kS.get(), Gains.Shooter.kV.get(), Gains.Shooter.kA.get(), 0)
099                                .withInvertedValue(InvertedValue.CounterClockwise_Positive);
100
101                TalonFXConfig SHOOTER_MOTOR_CENTER = new TalonFXConfig()
102                                .withPIDConstants(Gains.Shooter.kP.get(), Gains.Shooter.kI.get(), Gains.Shooter.kD.get(), 0)
103                                .withSupplyCurrentLimitAmps(80)
104                                .withNeutralMode(NeutralModeValue.Coast)
105                                .withFFConstants(Gains.Shooter.kS.get(), Gains.Shooter.kV.get(), Gains.Shooter.kA.get(), 0)
106                                .withInvertedValue(InvertedValue.CounterClockwise_Positive);
107
108                TalonFXConfig SHOOTER_MOTOR_RIGHT = new TalonFXConfig()
109                                .withPIDConstants(Gains.Shooter.kP.get(), Gains.Shooter.kI.get(), Gains.Shooter.kD.get(), 0)
110                                .withSupplyCurrentLimitAmps(80)
111                                .withNeutralMode(NeutralModeValue.Coast)
112                                .withFFConstants(Gains.Shooter.kS.get(), Gains.Shooter.kV.get(), Gains.Shooter.kA.get(), 0)
113                                .withInvertedValue(InvertedValue.Clockwise_Positive);
114        }
115
116        public interface Handoff {
117
118                TalonFXConfig HANDOFF_MOTOR_CONFIG = new TalonFXConfig()
119                                .withStatorCurrentLimitAmps(80)
120                                // .withRampRate(0.25)
121                                .withNeutralMode(NeutralModeValue.Coast)
122                                .withInvertedValue(InvertedValue.CounterClockwise_Positive)
123                                .withSensorToMechanismRatio(Settings.Handoff.GEAR_RATIO);
124        }
125
126        public static class TalonFXConfig {
127
128                private final TalonFXConfiguration configuration = new TalonFXConfiguration();
129
130                private final Slot0Configs slot0Configs = new Slot0Configs();
131
132                private final Slot1Configs slot1Configs = new Slot1Configs();
133
134                private final Slot2Configs slot2Configs = new Slot2Configs();
135
136                private final MotorOutputConfigs motorOutputConfigs = new MotorOutputConfigs();
137
138                private final ClosedLoopRampsConfigs closedLoopRampsConfigs = new ClosedLoopRampsConfigs();
139
140                private final OpenLoopRampsConfigs openLoopRampsConfigs = new OpenLoopRampsConfigs();
141
142                private final CurrentLimitsConfigs currentLimitsConfigs = new CurrentLimitsConfigs();
143
144                private final FeedbackConfigs feedbackConfigs = new FeedbackConfigs();
145
146                private final MotionMagicConfigs motionMagicConfigs = new MotionMagicConfigs();
147
148                private final double[] lastKP = new double[3];
149                private final double[] lastKI = new double[3];
150                private final double[] lastKD = new double[3];
151                private final double[] lastKS = new double[3];
152                private final double[] lastKV = new double[3];
153                private final double[] lastKA = new double[3];
154
155                public void updateGainsConfig(
156                                TalonFX motor,
157                                int slot,
158                                DoubleSubscriber kP,
159                                DoubleSubscriber kI,
160                                DoubleSubscriber kD,
161                                DoubleSubscriber kS,
162                                DoubleSubscriber kV,
163                                DoubleSubscriber kA) {
164                        if (slot != 0 && slot != 1 && slot != 2) {
165                                return;
166                        }
167
168                        final double currentKP = kP.get();
169                        final double currentKI = kI.get();
170                        final double currentKD = kD.get();
171                        final double currentKS = kS.get();
172                        final double currentKV = kV.get();
173                        final double currentKA = kA.get();
174
175                        final boolean changed = currentKP != lastKP[slot]
176                                        || currentKI != lastKI[slot]
177                                        || currentKD != lastKD[slot]
178                                        || currentKS != lastKS[slot]
179                                        || currentKV != lastKV[slot]
180                                        || currentKA != lastKA[slot];
181
182                        if (!changed) {
183                                return;
184                        }
185
186                        final SlotConfigs gainConfig = new SlotConfigs()
187                                        .withKP(currentKP)
188                                        .withKI(currentKI)
189                                        .withKD(currentKD)
190                                        .withKS(currentKS)
191                                        .withKV(currentKV)
192                                        .withKA(currentKA);
193
194                        gainConfig.SlotNumber = slot;
195
196                        motor.getConfigurator().apply(gainConfig);
197
198                        lastKP[slot] = currentKP;
199                        lastKI[slot] = currentKI;
200                        lastKD[slot] = currentKD;
201                        lastKS[slot] = currentKS;
202                        lastKV[slot] = currentKV;
203                        lastKA[slot] = currentKA;
204
205                        switch (slot) {
206                                case 0:
207                                        motor.getConfigurator().refresh(this.getConfiguration().Slot0);
208                                        break;
209                                case 1:
210                                        motor.getConfigurator().refresh(this.getConfiguration().Slot1);
211                                        break;
212                                case 2:
213                                        motor.getConfigurator().refresh(this.getConfiguration().Slot2);
214                                        break;
215                        }
216                }
217
218                public TalonFXConfiguration getConfiguration() {
219                        return this.configuration;
220                }
221
222                public void configure(TalonFX motor) {
223                        motor.getConfigurator().apply(configuration);
224                }
225
226                // SLOT 0 CONFIGS
227                public TalonFXConfig withPIDConstants(double kP, double kI, double kD, int slot) {
228                        switch (slot) {
229                                case 0:
230                                        configuration.withSlot0(slot0Configs.withKP(kP).withKI(kI).withKD(kD));
231                                        break;
232                                case 1:
233                                        configuration.withSlot1(slot1Configs.withKP(kP).withKI(kI).withKD(kD));
234                                        break;
235                                case 2:
236                                        configuration.withSlot2(slot2Configs.withKP(kP).withKI(kI).withKD(kD));
237                                        break;
238                        }
239                        return this;
240                }
241
242                public TalonFXConfig withFFConstants(double kS, double kV, double kA, int slot) {
243                        return withFFConstants(kS, kV, kA, 0, slot);
244                }
245
246                public TalonFXConfig withFFConstants(double kS, double kV, double kA, double kG, int slot) {
247                        switch (slot) {
248                                case 0:
249                                        configuration.withSlot0(slot0Configs.withKS(kS).withKV(kV).withKA(kA).withKG(kG));
250                                        break;
251                                case 1:
252                                        configuration.withSlot1(slot1Configs.withKS(kS).withKV(kV).withKA(kA).withKG(kG));
253                                        break;
254                                case 2:
255                                        configuration.withSlot2(slot2Configs.withKS(kS).withKV(kV).withKA(kA).withKG(kG));
256                                        break;
257                        }
258                        return this;
259                }
260
261                public TalonFXConfig withGravityType(GravityTypeValue gravityType) {
262                        configuration.withSlot0(slot0Configs.withGravityType(gravityType));
263                        configuration.withSlot1(slot1Configs.withGravityType(gravityType));
264                        configuration.withSlot2(slot2Configs.withGravityType(gravityType));
265                        return this;
266                }
267
268                // MOTOR OUTPUT CONFIGS
269                public TalonFXConfig withInvertedValue(InvertedValue invertedValue) {
270                        configuration.withMotorOutput(motorOutputConfigs.withInverted(invertedValue));
271                        return this;
272                }
273
274                public TalonFXConfig withNeutralMode(NeutralModeValue neutralMode) {
275                        configuration.withMotorOutput(motorOutputConfigs.withNeutralMode(neutralMode));
276                        return this;
277                }
278
279                // RAMP RATE CONFIGS
280                public TalonFXConfig withRampRate(double rampRate) {
281                        closedLoopRampsConfigs
282                                        .withDutyCycleClosedLoopRampPeriod(rampRate)
283                                        .withTorqueClosedLoopRampPeriod(rampRate)
284                                        .withVoltageClosedLoopRampPeriod(rampRate);
285                        openLoopRampsConfigs
286                                        .withDutyCycleOpenLoopRampPeriod(rampRate)
287                                        .withTorqueOpenLoopRampPeriod(rampRate)
288                                        .withVoltageOpenLoopRampPeriod(rampRate);
289                        configuration.withClosedLoopRamps(closedLoopRampsConfigs);
290                        configuration.withOpenLoopRamps(openLoopRampsConfigs);
291                        return this;
292                }
293
294                // CURRENT LIMIT CONFIGS
295                public TalonFXConfig withStatorCurrentLimitAmps(double currentLimitAmps) {
296                        currentLimitsConfigs
297                                        .withStatorCurrentLimit(currentLimitAmps)
298                                        .withStatorCurrentLimitEnable(true);
299                        configuration.withCurrentLimits(currentLimitsConfigs);
300                        return this;
301                }
302
303                public TalonFXConfig withSupplyCurrentLimitAmps(double currentLimitAmps) {
304                        currentLimitsConfigs
305                                        .withSupplyCurrentLimit(currentLimitAmps)
306                                        .withSupplyCurrentLimitEnable(true);
307                        configuration.withCurrentLimits(currentLimitsConfigs);
308                        return this;
309                }
310
311                // MOTION MAGIC CONFIGS
312                public TalonFXConfig withMotionProfile(double maxVelocity, double maxAcceleration) {
313                        motionMagicConfigs
314                                        .withMotionMagicCruiseVelocity(maxVelocity)
315                                        .withMotionMagicAcceleration(maxAcceleration);
316                        configuration.withMotionMagic(motionMagicConfigs);
317                        return this;
318                }
319
320                // FEEDBACK CONFIGS
321                public TalonFXConfig withRemoteSensor(
322                                int ID, FeedbackSensorSourceValue source, double rotorToSensorRatio) {
323                        feedbackConfigs
324                                        .withFeedbackRemoteSensorID(ID)
325                                        .withFeedbackSensorSource(source)
326                                        .withRotorToSensorRatio(rotorToSensorRatio);
327                        configuration.withFeedback(feedbackConfigs);
328                        return this;
329                }
330
331                public TalonFXConfig withSensorToMechanismRatio(double sensorToMechanismRatio) {
332                        configuration.withFeedback(
333                                        feedbackConfigs.withSensorToMechanismRatio(sensorToMechanismRatio));
334                        return this;
335                }
336        }
337}
